member.name: T:EckTechGames.AutoSave.AutoSaveExtension
member.summary: This static class registers the autosave methods when playmode state changes in the editor.

member.name: M:EckTechGames.AutoSave.AutoSaveExtension.#cctor
member.summary: Static constructor that gets called when Unity fires up or recompiles the scripts. (triggered by the InitializeOnLoad attribute above)

member.name: M:EckTechGames.AutoSave.AutoSaveExtension.AutoSaveWhenPlaymodeStarts(UnityEditor.PlayModeStateChange)
member.summary: This method saves open scenes and other assets when entering playmode.
member.param: The enum that specifies how the playmode is changing in the editor.
